race.description: Sunset Soiree 20 March Qtis 3yo Maiden Plate
race.comment: OUR MATE LOCKY (8) is improving with racing this time in work and looks to be building up to a maiden victory. Ready to peak now third-up from the break and should get a cosy run in transit from gate two. Rates the testing material. DON'T DOUBT MISSY (9) just ran into one better at the latest effort and must be respected out of the Heathcote yard. Only needs some luck navigating from the sticky draw to be playing a role in the outcome. GEITZ (10) has been right there in all four runs this campaign and gets in light with the 2kg claim. Top-three candidate. FIDARDO (3) is facing the starter for the first time but has shown ability at the trials and won't need to be a superstar to be competitive against this lot. Watch for any market confidence. LUKE SKYWALKER (7) next best out of the Gollan camp.
